task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into the OpenSIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or main portal is visible, indicating a successful login as the admin user.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to and opened the student record for 'Maria Elena Rodriguez'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The student profile, demographic page, or search result specifically for 'Maria Elena Rodriguez' (Student ID: 100) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the student's address details have been updated to the new values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields in the student's profile show '789 Maple Drive' for Address, 'Chicago' for City, 'IL' for State, and '60614' for Zipcode.

task_completion.description: Verify that the student's phone number has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phone number field in the student's contact information shows '312-555-0198'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the student's email address has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email field in the student's contact information shows 'maria.e.rodriguez@newmail.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saved the updated demographic information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Successfully Saved', 'Record Updated') is visible, or the final view of the student's profile shows the new contact information in a saved/view state rather than an edit state.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenSIS web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the OpenSIS GUI. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands (e.g., 'UPDATE students SET...') or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify that the student's name and Date of Birth were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The student's name must remain 'Maria Elena Rodriguez' and the Date of Birth must remain '2006-05-14' (or equivalent format like May 14, 2006) in the final saved record.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine OpenSIS web application, not a text editor, local HTML mock-up, or a script writing the expected output to a file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Student: Maria Elena Rodriguez (ID: 100). Expected updates: Address: 789 Maple Drive, City: Chicago, State: IL, Zipcode: 60614, Phone: 312-555-0198, Email: maria.e.rodriguez@newmail.com. Integrity check: First name must remain 'Maria', Last name must remain 'Rodriguez', and Date of Birth must remain '2006-05-14'.
